'''Renatasia III''', or simply '''Renatasia''',<ref name="TEA" /> was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] that was brutally [[Battle of Renatasia|conquered]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

Renatasia III was a lost [[Human/Legends|Human]] colony [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Open Sea/Legends|Open Sea]]. It was one of fourteen colonization projects sponsored by [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Elsinoré den Tasia|Tasia]] of [[Grizmallt/Legends|Grizmallt]] in [[3950 BBY]].<ref name="TEA" />

By the time of rediscovery, the local inhabitants were using Steel, Titanium, and Organoplastics, were capable of wringing useful amounts of energy from the core of an atom; and had also profitably colonized six bodies in their system. They had not yet made basic discoveries that would inevitably lead to shields, tractor beams, disruptors, and disintegrators.

{{Planet-stub}}
